questions.question: Who wrote the national anthem of India?
If an article is bought for Rs. 340 and sold at a profit of 25%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question: Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 82, 16, 25, 36
questions.explanation: 16, 25, and 36 are perfect squares. 82 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: Rs. 429 is divided between A and B in the ratio 4:7. What is A's share?
questions.explanation: Total parts = 4 + 7 = 11. Value of 1 part = 429/11 = 39. A's share = 4 * 39 = 156.
questions.trick: Divide total by sum of ratios, then multiply by A's ratio digit.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 15, 21, 27, 33, 39, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 6. So, 39 + (6) = 45.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: Who was the first President of India?
Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
If MAT is coded as OCV, how will MAN be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 2 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 4100 at an interest rate of 8% per annum over 5 years?
Find the next number in the series: 3, 6, 12, 24, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 2. So, 24 * 2 = 48.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 17 days while B can complete the same work in 21 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 17 * 21 = 357. Rate = 17 + 21 = 38. Time = Work / Rate = 9.39 days.
